title: Apiary Foraging Response — one drop-in activation across many meadows
strategies: trivial: identity/linear curve f(s)=s (== reference baseline, collapses the MLP to linear)
greedy: rectified curve f(s)=max(0,s) (a crude nonlinearity)
strong: smooth self-gated swish-like curve f(s)=s*sigmoid(1.7s)
